_source_note: Hand-crafted synthetic payload modeled on https://quizlet.com/blog/groups-are-now-classes/ (blog post + comment thread). Mirrors Firecrawl /v2/extract 'completed' response shape: { success, status, data: <UtterancesPayload>, ... }.

utterances.text: We've renamed Groups to Classes to better reflect how our community uses Quizlet. This makes it easier for teachers to organize study materials for their students.
utterances.author: Quizlet Team

utterances.text: Love the rename! Will existing Groups auto-migrate to Classes or do we need to recreate them manually?
utterances.author: alice_teacher

utterances.text: This is a breaking change for our integration. Is the API endpoint still /groups/ or has it moved to /classes/?
utterances.author: bob_dev

utterances.text: Existing Groups migrate automatically. The API endpoint is unchanged in this release for backwards compatibility.
utterances.author: Quizlet Team
